title: rubus calyculatus
intro: Rubus calyculatus, also known as the Thimble Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to parts of Asia and Europe. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and has been used to treat various health issues such as wounds, fever, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Rubus calyculatus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Rubus calyculatus can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
